top_project.name: Flask Route Smoke Test Suite
top_project.why: Protects KDT OS from breaking as it grows by proving important routes still load.
top_project.first_step: Create tests/test_routes.py and add one test that checks the home route returns 200.
top_project.proof: Upload test_routes.py and a screenshot or copied output from pytest.

recommended_projects.name: Flask Route Smoke Test Suite
recommended_projects.why: Protects KDT OS from breaking as it grows by proving important routes still load.
recommended_projects.first_step: Create tests/test_routes.py and add one test that checks the home route returns 200.
recommended_projects.proof: Upload test_routes.py and a screenshot or copied output from pytest.

recommended_projects.name: System Health Dashboard
recommended_projects.why: Turns your server troubleshooting experience into a reusable tool for CPU, RAM, disk, and service checks.
recommended_projects.first_step: Create a Python script that outputs fake or real CPU, memory, disk, and service status as OK/WARNING.
recommended_projects.proof: Upload code and a screenshot of the dashboard or terminal health report.
reasons: Targets current weak area: Health Monitoring
Strategic project for career or KDT OS growth.

recommended_projects.name: Workout Database App
recommended_projects.why: Builds the exact SQLite CRUD skills KDT OS keeps detecting as useful while staying small and personal.
recommended_projects.first_step: Create a folder with app.py and workouts.json or workouts.db, then add one workout record with exercise, reps, sets, and date.
recommended_projects.proof: Upload a ZIP showing create, list, update, and delete working on workout records.
reasons: Small enough to finish and prove quickly.

recommended_projects.name: JavaScript Form Saver
recommended_projects.why: Builds browser app confidence by saving form input without needing a backend yet.
recommended_projects.first_step: Create a form with name, note, and category fields, then save one entry to localStorage.
recommended_projects.proof: Upload ZIP and screenshot showing saved data still appears after refresh.
reasons: Moves a roadmap forward: Local Storage
Small enough to finish and prove quickly.

recommended_projects.name: API Weather Lookup App
recommended_projects.why: Turns API and JavaScript gaps into a visible browser app with an easy proof target.
recommended_projects.first_step: Create index.html, style.css, and script.js with a button that displays sample weather JSON.
recommended_projects.proof: Upload a ZIP and screenshot showing city, temperature, and condition displayed after button click.
reasons: Small enough to finish and prove quickly.

recommended_projects.name: Help Desk Ticket Tracker
recommended_projects.why: Connects your IT support experience to a portfolio project that demonstrates real workflow understanding.
recommended_projects.first_step: Create a ticket form with fields for issue, device, priority, status, and resolution notes.
recommended_projects.proof: Upload a ZIP and screenshots showing create, update status, and resolution notes.
reasons: Strategic project for career or KDT OS growth.

recommended_projects.name: Expense Tracker CLI
recommended_projects.why: Strengthens Python basics with a useful real-life tool and gives clear proof through saved totals.
recommended_projects.first_step: Create expense_tracker.py with a list of three expenses and print the total.
recommended_projects.proof: Upload the Python file and a screenshot of the terminal total.
reasons: Small enough to finish and prove quickly.

recommended_projects.name: Personal Project Portfolio Page
recommended_projects.why: Creates a clean place to show KDT OS, FieldSeed, and future projects while improving layout skills.
recommended_projects.first_step: Create index.html with cards for three projects: KDT OS, FieldSeed, and one future app.
recommended_projects.proof: Upload HTML/CSS and screenshot at full screen and mobile width.
reasons: Small enough to finish and prove quickly.

all_projects.name: KDT OS Quest Quality Repair Tool
all_projects.why: Improves KDT OS directly by making weak quests easier to repair and trust.
all_projects.first_step: Create a function that loads active quest JSON and prints quests missing quest_quality metadata.
all_projects.proof: Upload the function and a before/after report showing detected quest files.
reasons: Similar project may already exist; consider extending instead of duplicating.
Strategic project for career or KDT OS growth.

all_projects.name: Active Directory OU Practice Notes
all_projects.why: Converts your AD/OU confusion into a proof-backed explanation you can reuse for interviews and field work.
all_projects.first_step: Create README.md explaining what an OU is, why it matters, and where one test user/computer should go.
all_projects.proof: Upload README.md and, if available, a screenshot from your lab showing the OU structure.
reasons: Small enough to finish and prove quickly.

rule: KDT OS should turn learning gaps into real projects with a reason, first step, and proof requirement.
